name: login_1
text:
You opened this mod.
That proves you are a warrior.

name: login_2
text:
But the game is over now.
I'm going to play rock-paper-scissors with you **personally**.

name: win_1
text:
You think you're already that strong?
**Heh heh, wrong!**

name: win_2
text:
I was just not in top form today.
I'm leaving. Come challenge me to rock-paper-scissors again if you dare.

name: lose
text: To you, I am like a god — invincible.

name: ping
text: I'll let you off this time. Next time we meet, I'll duel you for real. You'd better surrender.
